mentions.note: AI-infused insuretech alternative to CCC Intelligent Solutions; better positioned for digital insurance future.

AI-native insurer with 90% first-time buyer penetration—likely #1 brand among new insurance entrants in many states. 10x gross premium growth since ChatGPT; cash flow positive, EBIT positive by late 2026. Moat: 1+ trillion proprietary claims data, regulation, capital barriers vs. OpenAI/Anthropic. Selloff unrelated to fundamentals; buy in weakness.
